title: saussurea nipponica subsp. higo-montana
intro: Saussurea nipponica subsp. higo-montana, also known as Japanese costus root, is a plant species in the sunflower family that is native to Japan. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Saussurea nipponica subsp. higo-montana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat digestive issues, making it a valuable remedy in traditional herbal medicine. Saussurea nipponica subsp. higo-montana is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
